creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 223252
nautilus-python-1.2.3.patch

Hi,

attached is the patch that updates x11-fm/nautilus-python to 1.2.3. It fixes some minor bugs and adds support for Python 3.8.

QA:
~~~
- poudriere -> OK (11.4-, 12.2-RELEASE, 13.0-RC2, 14.0-CURRENT@a9f113550 amd64 i386 / Python 3.7 default in Ports tree)
- poudriere -> OK (12.2-RELEASE amd64 / Python 3.8 default in Ports tree)
